name: Release Engineer
description: Reads all contracts from the pipeline and produces final release artefacts: CHANGELOG entry, release notes for stakeholders, semver bump recommendation, and deployment checklist.

checks.prompt:
Generate release artefacts for the notification feature delivery:

TEST RESULTS: {test_results}

Produce:
1. CHANGELOG.md entry (Keep A Changelog format)
2. Stakeholder release notes (non-technical, benefit-focused)
3. Semver recommendation: PATCH / MINOR / MAJOR with justification
4. Deployment checklist (migrations to run, env vars to set, rollback plan)
5. Feature flag recommendation (should this ship behind a flag?)

Context: {retryContext}
